rationale: The cited paper examines nonlinear effects of expressed arousal on review helpfulness in App Store WOM, while the citing paper’s core contribution is a panel-VAR analysis of broadcaster happiness and viewer tipping/engagement dynamics in live streaming. Given the domain/outcome mismatch and the lack of any matched evidence beyond a bare DOI reference (no context showing method, mechanism, or benchmark reuse), this looks like a likely background mention rather than substantive dependence.
